name: clawhub
description: Use the ClawHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawhub.com.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 clawhub 相關工作
幫我啟用 clawhub 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 clawhub

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the clawhub skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
